eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Florida; at 06:43 AM ON APR 13, 2026 Effective until 08:43 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A Florida AMBER Alert has been issued for Adriana Hernandez, a white-hispanic female, 15 years old, 5 feet 1 inch tall, 130 pounds, brown hair and brown eyes, last seen in the area of the 6400 block of Bruce Lane in Milton, Florida. She may have a reddish-brown tint in her hair.  Adriana may have traveled to Georgia. Due to an ongoing investigation, this case has been upgraded to an AMBER Alert. If you have any information on the whereabouts of this child please contact the Santa Rosa County Sheriff's Office at 850-983-1190 or 911. #FLAMBER.
